title: High-Impact Modern Comic-Book Portrait Poster
sourceTitle: Modern Comic Book World Cup 2026 National Team Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-impact modern Comic Book World Cup 2026 portrait poster for France National Team identity. Subject: dynamic adult French footballer with intense match-ready expression wears an authentic France National Team jersey with realistic fabric simulation, premium textile texture, accurate stitching, natural folds, and professional finish. Scene: International football pride scene built from French tricolor colors, rooster-inspired emblem shapes, Paris stadium energy, and national football pride, combining national colors, culture, symbols, competitive spirit, and modern editorial sports-poster energy. Composition: New expressive pose using powerful forward-driving pose with one arm cutting through comic motion streaks, not copied from any reference; layered comic panels, halftone dots, motion lines, speed effects, action streaks, bold overlays, and dynamic typography create movement without overwhelming the athlete. Signature Elements: Preserved modern comic book world cup 2026 national team poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Team Color Palette: deep blue, white, red, black ink, and bright stadium highlights. Style: Modern comic-book sports artwork for World Cup 2026, contemporary sports-comic aesthetic, premium editorial poster design, explosive graphic accents, energetic visual storytelling, and international football campaign finish. Color Palette: The primary visual focus must be the specific nation National Team identity, incorporating visual elements inspired by the nation's football culture, colors, symbols, and competitive spirit. mixed with halftone shadows, bold comic ink accents, bright action highlights, and premium sports-poster contrast. Lighting: Cinematic comic rim light, high-contrast sports portrait shadows, bright graphic highlights, and clear jersey texture visibility. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
